name: secondary_calibration_GSE235923_results.txt
preview:
###############

secondary calibration with GSE235923

#################

GSE235923 is a public pediatric AML scRNA-seq cohort of 31 bone marrow samples across diagnosis (Dx), end of induction (EOI), and relapse timepoints. GEO lists processed data in GSE235923_RAW.tar as MTX/TSV files and explicitly says raw sequencing data are not included. The sample list corresponds to 19 Dx, 10 EOI, and 2 relapse samples across 20 patients.  

That makes it a good secondary calibration cohort for your workflow:
	•	use Dx samples as the main calibration set against the primary GSE235063-derived structure,
	•	then use EOI/relapse as a temporal stress test rather than mixing them into initial calibration.  

Recommended role of GSE235923 in the pipeline

I would structure it this way:
	1.	Calibration cohort: Dx-only samples from GSE235923
	2.	Temporal validation add-on: EOI and relapse samples from GSE235923
	3.	Do not retrain the primary ecotype space from scratch on this cohort first; instead, map it onto the primary framework and assess concordance/calibration.

First step

Download and extract GSE235923_RAW.tar into something like:

/Users/seung-hwan.kim/Desktop/Ecotype_OU_Branching/GSE235923/GSE235923_RAW/

Then run this inventory script.
